info.title: ROS Policy
info.description: Define, evaluate, and enforce data retention policies

schema.title: Response List Policies Api V1 Policies Get
Response Create Policy Api V1 Policies Post
Response Get Policy Api V1 Policies  Policy Id  Get
Response Update Policy Api V1 Policies  Policy Id  Put
Response Delete Policy Api V1 Policies  Policy Id  Delete
Response Change Policy Status Api V1 Policies  Policy Id  Status Post
Response List Policy Versions Api V1 Policies  Policy Id  Versions Get
Response Get Policy Version Api V1 Policies  Policy Id  Versions  Ver  Get
Response Activate Policy Version Api V1 Policies  Policy Id  Versions  Ver  Activate Post
Response Classify Batch Api V1 Classify Batch Post
Response Evaluate Batch Api V1 Evaluate Batch Post
Response List Jobs Api V1 Enforce Jobs Get
Response List Requests Api V1 Dsar Requests Get
Response List Webhooks Api V1 Webhooks Get
Response List Audit Logs Api V1 Audit Logs Get
Response List All Api V1 Jurisdictions Get
Response Get One Api V1 Jurisdictions  Code  Get

EvaluationRequest.description: Request to evaluate a record against policies.

PolicyDiffChange.description: A single structural change between two policy versions.
